name: GH_RelevantObjectFilter
summary: Enumerates the possible filters to use in relevant object searches.

enum_values.name: None
enum_values.summary: Blank filter. When combined with another filter it is ignored.

enum_values.name: Groups
enum_values.summary: Include group objects in the search.

enum_values.name: InputGrips
enum_values.summary: Include input grips in the search.

enum_values.name: OutputGrips
enum_values.summary: Include output grips in the search.

enum_values.name: Grips
enum_values.summary: Include both input and outpu grips in the search.

enum_values.name: Attributes
enum_values.summary: Include attribute bounds in the search.
